title: TEMPLATE Miniature cabinet inspired by IKEA Radmanso in 1:12 scale | PDF
description: To make this miniature cabinet, you will need: a 1 mm thick wooden sheet for parts No. 1–14, a matchstick (about 2 mm in diameter) for the legs, glue (such as Tacky Glue), sandpaper or a nail file, and optional acrylic paints and varnish for finishing. The price includes 1 PDF file (A4) containing a detailed assembly guide and cutting templates for all parts. Each part is numbered according to the scheme, making the assembly process clear and easy to follow. Please note that…
